# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - ssh-add <(echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY")
  - git config --global user.email "ci@company.com"
  - git config --global user.name "CI/CD Pipeline"

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
    - echo "MR Description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
  only:
    - merge_requests

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to environment..."
    - git tag -a "v${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}" -m "Deployed from MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - git push origin "v${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "Commit message: Deployed MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
  only:
    - merge_requests
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.company.com

notification_job:
  stage: notify
  script:
    - echo "Sending notification..."
    - |
      curl -X POST \
        -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
        -H "Authorization: Bearer $NOTIFICATION_TOKEN" \
        -d '{
          "title": "Deployment Notification",
          "message": "Deployed MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE} with description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}",
          "commit_message": "Deployed MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}",
          "mr_url": "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_URL"
        }' \
        $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK_URL
  only:
    - merge_requests
  dependencies:
    - deploy_job
